first things first

A big warm hug
from me to you 🫂

Today I just want you to know — you don't have to be okay. You don't have to reply fast, be cheerful, or explain anything to anyone. Your only job today is to rest, stay warm, eat something nice, and breathe.

I know periods can feel like your whole body is fighting itself. But you are the kind of person who still shows up, even on your hardest days — because that's just who you are. Today? Just rest.

You are so, so loved. Especially on days like today.

🌸 You've got this, Meghana 🌸
us, counted

the ones I hold tight

Our memories 🌺

🌙
3 AM · Feb 12
The NTR Coupon Night
You woke up at 3 AM — THREE IN THE MORNING — just to register for a food coupon I mentioned. Nobody asked you to. You just did it. That was the moment I knew you were different from everyone else.
🛕
Feb 12 · First Real Day
Temple → Lunch
Our first real day together. The temple, lunch. Nothing felt forced. Nothing needed to be said. Just easy. I replay that day more often than you'd think.
🎂
Mar 11 · Your Birthday
My baby gurls Dat
The best birhtday celebration and planning i really enjoyed and tried new things which i never did to anyone before
🍵
Every single morning
"Uta Maddhya?"
The way you check if I ate. The way I ask if you did. It sounds like nothing but it's everything. It's how we say "I'm thinking of you" without making it a whole thing. I love that about us.
🍛
Multiple times
Amma's Fish Curry
My mom cooked for you. She doesn't do that for just anyone. She likes you. And honestly? I like you even more than she does — and that's really saying something.
🛵
After your exams 🤝
Tirupathi (A Promise)
You said "after exams." Deal is deal, Meghana. I'm taking the bike. We're going. That is not a maybe, it's a plan. I'm counting it as a promise and I'm holding you to it.
in case you ever forget

for today specifically

Your only jobs
today are these 🌸

🌡️
Stay warm. Blanket on. Heating pad on your tummy — no arguments.
🍵
Drink something hot — ginger tea, warm milk, anything. Just drink it.
🛏️
Rest as much as your body asks. No guilt. You deserve every minute of it.
🎵
Put on Zara Zara. You know you want to. I know you're already thinking about it.
🍫
Eat something you love today. No excuses — you earned it, chinnu.
📵
Put the phone down after this. Just breathe. You don't owe anyone anything today.
from me, to you

A small letter

Meghana, You asked me once if I love you because I actually love you, or just to prove it to others. The answer has always been the same. I love you because of the person you are the one who woke up at 3 AM just to register a silly food coupon for me, the one who says "uta madu" like it's the most natural thing in the world, the one who told me "I'm sooo proud, I'm so happy, I can't even explain how I'm feeling" and made me feel like the luckiest person alive. I know things between us haven't always been easy. I know I've made it harder some days than it needed to be. But through everything — every argument, every "sari sari," every late night call — one thing hasn't changed. The way I feel when I see your name on my screen. Still the same. Always the same. Today, while your body is asking you to slow down . I just want you to feel one thing: you are enough. You are more than enough. On your quiet days, your tired days, your "I don't want to talk to anyone" days you are still my favourite person in every room, every moment, every memory. Rest well today, chinnu. I'm not going anywhere. 🌸

— Your Naresh 🎀
💌
🌸

"I promise to be here on every ordinary day, every difficult day, and every beautiful day making sure you always know how loved you are."

— Naresh, always 🎀

Get well soon,
my Chinnu always for you

💕

made with every bit of love · only for you · always
